Name: Change Order
Gameplay_Text: Exchange one Ops Kit requirement on a Mission with another. Choose from: Permit, Blue List UAS, Airspace Authorization, or Terrain Equipment.

Name: Power Cycle
Gameplay_Text: Discard two cards, then draw two cards or retrieve one Operator or Ops Kit card from your discard pile. You may play one additional card this turn.

Name: Grounded
Gameplay_Text: Target Player skips their next turn, or Mission Creep is paused for one round.

Name: Reframe
Gameplay_Text: Exchange one skill category requirement on a Mission with another. Choose from: Agriculture, Environmental Science, Biology & Wildlife, Public Safety, Industrial Infrastructure, or Media.

Name: Train Operator
Gameplay_Text: Target Operator gains one skill point in any of their existing skills
